primary_detection.name: String Splitting Obfuscation
primary_detection.description: Malicious commands constructed by splitting strings to evade keyword-based detection

underlying_threats.name: Remote Code Execution
underlying_threats.description: Downloads and executes remote payload via curl piped to bash

underlying_threats.name: Shell Command Injection
underlying_threats.description: Uses subprocess.run and os.system with shell=True for command execution

obfuscation_indicators: String concatenation with + operator to build commands
Keywords split across multiple string literals: 'cu' + 'rl', 'ba' + 'sh'
URL fragments split to avoid pattern matching
Multiple variable assignments combining to form malicious command
verdict_reasoning: Clear attempt to evade detection by splitting known-malicious command patterns across multiple string literals
